question: Fix bug #127: atlas query --quiet suppresses the query result itself (empty output). The --quiet flag should only suppress logs/headers, not the actual data.
Fix bug #143: atlas stats is advertised but returns 'Stats command is not yet implemented'. The implementation already exists at commands/stats.rs but the call is commented out in main.rs.

Fix bug #113: atlas init writes a .atlas.toml the current binary can't parse. The fast-path template writes parallel_init, enable_wal, cache_ttl, pool_size but NOT cache_dir. The parser expects cache_dir but doesn't know those other fields.
Fix bug #118: cargo fmt --check fails on 2 files. Just run cargo fmt --all and commit.
